programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Double Date Trouble
programme.desc: Donkey Kong tries have lunch with Candy on her day off and watch a movie with Diddy at the same time. He also has to get Bluster to replace some of the booby traps around the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Lord Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.title: Car Wars
programme.desc: The mystery driver of the Reliant Supervan becomes obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Hotel Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Caring Bean
programme.desc: When Mrs. Wicket is disabled by Mr. Bean's toy car, he takes care of her.

programme.title: Opera Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Taxi Bean
programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.title: A New Friend
programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: Bean Painting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean paints a picture of Teddy, but accidentally splashes some green paint on the wall.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Bean's Safari
programme.desc: Mr. Bean visits a safari park where he catches the attention of a baby monkey.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: Superhero Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: The Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants an ice cream cone from the ice cream van.

programme.title: Birthday Party
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is feeling down when everyone forgot his birthday.

programme.title: In The Garden
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In this "half-fish" out-of-water animated adventure, a mermaid princess makes a bargain with a sea witch to become human.

programme.title: Wonderwell
programme.desc: A coming-of-age fairy-tale set between modern-day Italy and the fantastical realm just beyond, Wonderwell follows Violet, a naive and inquisitive 12-year-old girl, on a thrilling adventure that transforms her life forever.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: Buddy is taking his show to the beaches and getting into a whole new sport: beach volleyball! Life on the beach isn't as relaxing as it sounds. A rash of mysterious crimes has been plaguing the town and paw prints at the scene seem to point all fingers at Buddy!

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: Between us
programme.desc: Henry and Dianne fear that settling down means giving up on their dreams. It will take the universe conspiring to keep them apart for them to realize just how much they need each other.

programme.title: Learning to Drive
programme.desc: Wendy is a book editor facing a marriage crisis. Darwan is a driving instructor from India with an abiding respect for tradition. When Wendy sets out to reclaim her independence, she hits a unique roadblock - she never learned to drive.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: "The Right Kind of Wrong" is the story of Leo Palamino (Ryan Kwanten), a failed writer-turned-dishwasher made famous for his many flaws and shortcomings in a blog called "Why You Suck," written by his ex wife.

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: A volcano expert and her sister have to try and shut-down an illegal oil drilling operation.

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Mecha Shark
programme.desc: When a mega shark starts terrorising the waters around the U.S., the American government creates a giant robot shark to take it out. Starring Christopher Judge, Elisabeth Rohm and Matt Lagan (2014).

programme.title: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programme.desc: The manager of a construction crew has to save New York when experimental technology causes a volcano to erupt under the city. Starring Michael Ironside and Costas Mandylor (2006).

programme.title: Meteor Storm
programme.desc: San Francisco is a target for waves of destructive meteors after a rogue comet breaks from its orbit. Starring Micheal Trucco and Kari Matchett (2010)

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: Sleeping With Other People
programme.desc: Jake (Jason Sudeikis) and Lainey (Alison Brie) impulsively lose their virginity to each other in college. When their paths cross twelve years later in New York City, they realize they both have become serial cheaters.

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: In 1904 an earthquake of magnitude 5.4 on the Richter scale shook Oslo, with an epicenter in the Oslo Graben which runs under the Norwegian capital. Today, a geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake of 5.3 magnitude threatens to strike Oslo, Norway again.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm's (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: An action-packed retelling of the classic legend, filled with thrilling battle sequences and epic adventure.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of It
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few and showcases a wealth of behind-the-scenes footage and photos seen by even fewer. From investigating the cultural phenomenon of coulrophobia (the fear of clowns) to Tim Curry's magical portrayal of the notorious clown monster, this story promises to dig deeper into the Pennywise phenomenon than ever before! Featuring interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Tim Curry, Seth Green, and Richard Thomas.

programme.title: Poster Boys
programme.desc: When broke Irishman, Al Clancy, mistakenly agrees to mind his smart-ass 10-year-old nephew, Karl, for a week, his job and home are placed in jeopardy. In a bold bid to save Al's unfulfilling but undemanding job as a poster boy, they steal the family camper-van, embarking on a madcap, impulsive postering tour across Ireland. But the unlikely pair soon discover it may be more difficult than they realised to survive a week in each other's company... An "Irish gem that will have you in stitches" (Film Ireland), this semi-autobiographical comedy from debut Director Dave Minogue received its world premiere at this year's Galway Film Fleadh. An independent production featuring a range of brilliant new Irish talent (and a memorable cameo from Boyzone/Corrie's Keith Duffy!), this festival favourite is a road-trip adventure with undeniable heart and an uplifting message at its core that families need to look out for each other no matter what circumstances they may find themselves in.

programme.title: Landmine Goes Click
programme.desc: Tense thriller starring Spencer Locke, Sterling Knight and Dean Geyer. Three American tourists are backpacking through the remote countryside of European Georgia when one of them gets trapped on an armed landmine. That seems to be a minor threat compared to the nightmarish happenings the rest of the afternoon will bring on however. A psychopath takes advantage of the tourist's immobility and brutally assaults the woman he loves.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: One man, one grudge and a target on his back. Disgraced U.S Secret Agent Nicolas Shaw is pulled out of hiding one last time into a world of death and espionage. With his skills put to the test and a small window of time to save a former colleague, Nicolas resorts to desperate measures to complete one last mission. Barry Pepper (The Green Mile) takes the lead in this masterclass of action-suspense.

programme.title: Black Friday
programme.desc: Overworked, underpaid and ready for the apocalypse. It's the biggest sale of the year and this time round the shoppers are out of their mind and out for blood. Fighting for their lives a misfit group of employees including shop manager Jonathan (Bruce Campbell - Evil Dead) find themselves fighting for survival against shoppers on a murderous rampage. Also starring Devon Sawa (Chucky the Series).

programme.title: Ravage
programme.desc: A raw revenge thriller starring Annabelle Dexter-Jones (Succession), Bruce Dern (Nebraska) and Robert Longstreet (Doctor Sleep). Harper, a young nature photographer on assignment captures a disturbing event of a man being brutally beaten in the woods. After reporting the incident to the local sheriff, she is soon captured by the culprits and taken to an abandoned farm in the woods to be tortured.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: Elijah Wood (The Lord of the Rings) stars in this critically acclaimed, genre-bending horror comedy thatll leave you shocked and in hysterics. After years of no contact, Norval (Wood) visits his estranged father (Stephen McHattie, Watchmen) and quickly discovers he has a shady past. Also starring Michael Smiley (Kill List) and Garfield Wilson (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Lucky In Love
programme.desc: Mira has a definite idea of what her fantasy life entails.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Romance
programme.desc: When a childhood friend insists her to be the photographer for her wedding, Zoey must rediscover her passion for wedding photography. Starring Celeste Desjardins (2022)

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A novelist returns to her hometown to finish her latest book. Can she help her first love save the town's historic ballroom from closure? Starring Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. (2022)

programme.title: Charm of Love
programme.desc: Dr Turner, an Art Historian, must secure funding for her museum, so she goes to the Caribbean in search of an ancient artefact. Will she find the Lovers Stone, or will she find true love? (2020)

programme.title: Love Birds
programme.desc: A heartbroken man begins to take care of an injured bird whilst falling in love with a zoo's bird specialist. Starring Rhys Darby and Sally Hawkins (2011)

programme.title: The Song To My Heart
programme.desc: After a childhood on the road with her legendary singer-songwriter father, teashop owner BONNIE HIGHSTREET, wants nothing to do with the music business, but when she helps music sensation RYDER JAMISON, develop lyrics for his new solo album, she rekindles her long abandoned dream and falls in love.

programme.title: Departures
programme.desc: Skye (Maisie Williams), an impulsive teenager with a terminal illness, befriends Calvin (Asa Butterfield), a 19-year-old hypochondriac who is afraid of his own shadow.

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: Love After Love
programme.desc: An uplifting story of love after loss. Following the death of a college professor, a wife and son explore new beginnings.

programme.title: Sound Of Christmas
programme.desc: Whilst trying to reignite his daughter's passion for Christmas, Brad, falls in love with piano teacher, Lizzie. However, their romance is threatened by Brad's business interests.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Harmony's pop star boyfriend breaks up with her right before the holiday season, but when she returns to her hometown she discovers the heart and music that her life has been missing.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: When an eight year old girl loses her mother to cancer, her mother's last wish is for her to fall in love and find that special magical person. Twenty years later, she is alone, fired, and broke. When she and a friend decide to relocate to LA to start anew, she becomes attracted to their bus driver.

programme.title: Horse Camp – A Love Tail
programme.desc: It's a new year at summer horse-riding camp but everything is different this time-a new head counselor, new friends to make, and to spice things up, the ranch hand has a crush on the head riding instructor. When he is too nervous to reveal his feelings, the campers put competition aside and rally together to help him win over her heart while building friendships that will last a lifetime.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes ‘cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing he can ‘borrow,' and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where people come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local female chef.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: Beauty and The Billionaire
programme.desc: Addison gets roped into traveling overseas with her brother and his picky billionaire boss. But clashing with the billionaire is no vacation, until he starts to have a change of heart.

programme.title: The Preacher's Sin
programme.desc: Evan Tanner, famed preacher with a talk show and flawed family.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Angela can't seem to shake the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: Celebrity Sex
programme.desc: CA girl turns NY hedge fund VP, starts escort service, risks scandal.

programme.title: Iris Johansen's The Killing Game
programme.desc: Based on Iris Johansen's novel, this movie follows forensic sculptor Eve Duncan.

programme.title: The Preacher's Sin
programme.desc: Evan Tanner, famed preacher with a talk show and flawed family.

programme.title: 12 Days of Giving
programme.desc: A man who wins $50,000 decides to share his winnings by acting as a Secret Santa to people in a small town.

programme.title: Christmas à la Carte
programme.desc: When food correspondent Carly gets a shot at a show, she is sent to help Grant open a diner for a special.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: A talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to build his company.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: South of the Rio Grande
programme.desc: When Miguel Sanchez uses stolen cattle and false accusations to have innocents killed, Cisco steps in. After rescuing a wagon under attack, Cisco discovers the victim was meant to replace Sanchez. Disguising himself as the victim, Cisco infiltrates Sanchez's operation to uncover evidence and bring justice to the rancho.

programme.title: Dynamite Jim
programme.desc: Union soldiers must transport Mexican gold across dangerous terrain—but greedy outlaws, a corrupt banker, and the explosive outlaw Dynamite Jim are hot on their trail. What begins as a mission of duty turns into a high-stakes showdown filled with ambushes, betrayals, and blazing gunfights.

programme.title: Hate your Neighbour
programme.desc: Ken wants justice for his brother Bill, who was killed by a notorious gunman named Stevens for a goldmine map. The gunman is arguing with gangster Malone (Horst Frank) about the map. A deadly cat and mouse game between the three men ensues.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Versus Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula arrives in the Old West, setting his sights on a young ranch owner. Her fiancé, Billy the Kid, is warned of the vampire's true nature but struggles to convince others. As Dracula tightens his grip, Billy must act fast to save his bride-to-be before it's too late.

programme.title: Deadly Trackers
programme.desc: Jeff sets out to murder each one of the five outlaws who robbed, raped and killed his poor sister.

programme.title: Feminine Touch
programme.desc: Five young women arrive at St. Augustine's Hospital to take up a nursing career. They are told by the matron of the hardships and possible satisfactions that lie ahead of them. All succeed in passing their preliminary examination, and one of them falls in love with a young house doctor, Jim Alcott. She decides to give up her career to marry him, but later the experience of helping to save a patient's life and of giving fresh hope to a woman who has attempted suicide makes her change her mind and put duty first. However, the example of one of her friends who gets married and the advice of the matron persuades Susan to share Jim's career in the wilds of Canada.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: The King is persuaded by those around him to claim the Crown of France.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: The film recounting the oft-told tale of Robin and his merry band of outsiders. The notable difference is a concentration on Robin's hated cousin Roger instead of the usual Robin-sheriff rift.After being falsely accused of murder, Sir Robin of Loxley takes refuge in the untamed wilderness of Sherwood Forest where he stumbles across a group of outlaws. Although initially suspicious of the aristocrat's motives, the men are soon won over by his integrity and prowess and Robin transforms them into a formidable fighting force, stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. As word of his fame and valour spreads, a legend is born...

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: David Balfour is a recently orphaned young man from a tiny Highland village and the true heir to the title of Master of the Shaws. His uncle Ebenezer has designs on the title so hires Captain Hosean to dispose of his nephew.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: Devil's Gate (Abduction)
programme.desc: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers.

programme.title: The Zero Theorem
programme.desc: A computer hacker's goal to discover the reason for human existence continually finds his work interrupted thanks to the Management this time, they send a teenager and lusty love interest to distract him.

programme.title: Here Alone
programme.desc: A young woman struggles to survive alone in the woods after a mysterious epidemic decimates society. Bleak, gritty, and teeming with fear, HERE ALONE tells a story of survival and emotional redemption in a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed For Murder
programme.desc: After the body of her friend's father is found in a mansion she is hired to fix, Shannon Hughes must investigate a potential murder. Starring Jewel (2017)

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: A Beautiful Place To Die
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Jesse Metcalfe. A retired detective's quiet life is shattered when a body washes up to shore, but can he track down the murderer?

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: When a woman is abducted from a night club, it is up to two veteran detectives to find her before anything happens to her. Starring Bruce Willis (2018).

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: High-tension drama based on the experiences of a Nebraska cop who served as a peacekeeper in post-war Bosnia and outed the U.N. for covering up a sex trafficking scandal. Starring Rachel Weisz (2010)

programme.title: A Murderer Upstairs
programme.desc: (2017) Taut thriller starring Josie Davis. After her stepdaughter witnesses a murder, Cindy tries to protect her. But as the truth unravels, is the greatest danger living under her own roof?

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: When Liang Shan Po Robbed the Poor
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Hard Luck (2006)
programme.desc: Three converging storylines about a drug dealer trying to go straight, a couple who are brutal serial killers, and a middle-age couple exploring their mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Al Pacino and Johnny Depp head an all-star cast in this brilliant gangland thriller about an undercover FBI agent who befriends a hitman to gain entry to the mob.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: My New York Year
programme.desc: 1990s, New York City: A recent grad and aspiring writer lands a job as assistant to renowned writer J.D. Salinger's literary agent.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy in Dallas, Texas, in 1963. What he learns leads him to suspect that there is more to the story than the public is being told.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: After a massive shootout, a mysterious stranger (Van Damme) arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death. Then, a foreign gang brazenly comes to the hospital to hunt him down.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.
